name_en: YSL Calfskin WOC Small Envelope Bag. This is a must-have! Made from original factory grain calfskin, structured shape, comfortable to the touch. Removable shoulder strap allows it to be used as a clutch or evening bag. Multiple card slots, very practical. Take your phone and cards, and you're ready to go.
name_cn:
YSL Calfskin WOC Small Envelope Bag. This is a must-have! Made from original factory grain calfskin, structured shape, comfortable to the touch. Removable shoulder strap allows it to be used as a clutch or evening bag. Multiple card slots, very practical. Take your phone and cards, and you're ready to go.
Model: S8091
Size: 19x11.5x4cm
